light_pressure_read.read: High pressure and low cloud cover make this fishable but technical.

stocking_read.read: Recent stocking supports eggs, worms, and attractor nymphs.

angler_analysis.expected_trout_behavior: Expect trout to favor the most comfortable feeding lanes while staying close to cover when light is high.
angler_analysis.presentation_style: Prioritize clean drifts, smaller natural patterns, and stocked-trout attractors where appropriate.

fly_reasoning.egg_pattern: Recent stocking makes eggs a logical confidence fly.
fly_reasoning.squirmy_worm: A simple stocked-trout attractor and good dirty-water option.
fly_reasoning.duracell: A strong attractor nymph when fish will move a little but are not fully aggressive.
fly_reasoning.zebra_midge: Small and natural for clear, pressured, technical conditions.
fly_reasoning.pheasant_tail: A reliable natural nymph when trout are feeding but cautious.

caution_notes: Bright/high-pressure conditions may make fish cover-oriented and less forgiving.

generated_text.quick_read: Fishing on the Toccoa River is fair with technical conditions due to high pressure and light cloud cover. Recent stocking improves chances using attractor flies and eggs.
generated_text.best_window: The morning of day 2 is best due to moderate sky cover, high humidity, low rain chances, and calm winds offering trout comfort and improved feeding activity.
generated_text.current_conditions: Current USGS data shows a flow of 236 cfs and gage height of 1.23 ft. Water temperature and turbidity data are unavailable.
generated_text.weather_setup: Pressure is high at 30.19 inHg with stable trend. Sky cover averages 27.64%, wind is light at 1.5 mph average, and rain probability is low with up to 0.17 inches expected later.
generated_text.what_this_means: Trout will hold in shade, deeper runs, undercut banks, and near structure to stay comfortable under bright, high-pressure skies. Use smaller natural flies and careful drifts with stocked-trout attractors like egg pattern, squirmy worm, and duracell for best results. Exercise caution as fish may be less aggressive and cover-oriented.
